description: 20 hand-written evaluation queries for Assignment 1. Each query lists document IDs that should appear in top-5 results. Five queries are marked hard (paraphrase, negation, ambiguity, rare terms, or conflicting phrasing).

queries.text: Does the 1000 Genomes Project help map rare genetic variants with stronger effects than common SNPs?
Is abnormal prion protein positivity found in about one in two thousand people in the United Kingdom?
What evidence links low birth weight to perinatal mortality rates around five percent?
ADAR1 interaction with Dicer in pre-miRNA processing
AIRE expression in cutaneous neoplasms
ALDH1 as a marker for improved breast cancer survival
APOE4 in iPSC neurons alpha-beta and tau phosphorylation GABA degeneration
PPM1D activation and p53 tumor suppressor pathway
Helicobacter pylori urease structure UreA UreB subunits
Albendazole treatment for lymphatic filariasis
Alizarin hydrogen bonding PGAM1 substrate binding site
Hematopoietic stem cell chromosome segregation randomness
ACE inhibitors and functional renal insufficiency risk
Microerythrocyte count and severe anemia in alpha-thalassemia trait
Asymptomatic vCJD carrier prevalence United Kingdom one thousand individuals
Zero-dimensional scaffold materials promote tissue induction.
queries.notes: Paraphrase of biomaterials inductive-properties claim; wording differs from abstract.

queries.text: B12 vitamin shortage raises homocysteine concentrations in blood.
queries.notes: Paraphrased mechanism query with two acceptable evidence documents.

queries.text: Turning on AMPK makes lung inflammation fibrosis worse.
ALDH1 is linked to worse breast cancer prognosis.
queries.notes: Same target doc as q06 but opposite prognosis direction—tests claim-sensitive retrieval.

queries.text: Women's heart failure rates fell ten percent since the late 1970s.
queries.notes: Paraphrased epidemiology claim; easy to retrieve topically similar but wrong papers.
